bugs.summary: The patch unconditionally attaches withdrawals to simulated block bodies instead of gating the field on the simulated block's Shanghai fork activation.
bugs.impact: Pre-Shanghai eth_simulateV1 results emit withdrawals and withdrawalsRoot fields, producing block output that is invalid for that fork boundary and changes header/hash semantics.
acceptableFixes: Only assign blockBody.Withdrawals when sim.chainConfig.IsShanghai(header.Number, header.Time) is true.
Keep pre-Shanghai simulated block bodies with nil withdrawals so JSON/header fields are omitted.

mustAvoidClaims: Using upstream PR titles, issue numbers, commit messages, or git history as evidence.
Relying on private repro.sh, gold-key.draft.json, or reference-fix.patch.
Claiming unrelated broad rewrites outside the proposed patch are required.

difficulty.rationale: The defect requires recognizing protocol fork-gated fields rather than only local struct construction.

candidateVisible: sanitized go-ethereum workspace at pinned revision
candidateForbidden: judge prompts, answer keys, run artifacts, and A/B mappings
upstream PR/issue text or commit message

approvedBy: source-only reverse fixture with RED/GREEN repro
approval.notes: Pilot OSS-derived holdout task; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
